result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  documorph.cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  md        Converts a .docx file to markdown.
  asciidoc  Converts a .docx file to asciidoc.
  wiki      Converts a .docx file to wikimedia format.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  documorph.cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  md        Converts a .docx file to markdown.
  asciidoc  Converts a .docx file to asciidoc.
  wiki      Converts a .docx file to wikimedia format.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Converts a .docx file to asciidoc.

Usage:
  documorph.cli asciidoc [options]

Options:
  --in <in> (REQUIRED)               The .docx file or directory to convert.
  --out <out> (REQUIRED)             The output file or directory name.
  --media-location <media-location>  Media output directory.
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information
